title: Update i18n keys + final integration and verification
description: Update i18n/zh.js with any new or modified translation keys needed for the compact UI (settings page back button label, compact empty state text, etc.). Then perform final integration verification: ensure all 4 previous tasks work together, all contracts preserved, panel renders correctly at 300px and 450px widths. Fix any integration issues discovered.

criteria: All t() calls in panel/index.js resolve to valid i18n keys in zh.js
New keys added: SETTINGS.BACK_BUTTON or equivalent for back navigation label
Any removed UI elements have their unused i18n keys cleaned up or marked
Panel opens without console errors in Cocos Creator editor
Complete user flow works: search -> view results -> add component -> delete component -> settings page -> return
Panel renders correctly at 300px width (minimum usable)
All 13 IPC message handlers respond correctly
convergence.verification: Open panel in Cocos Creator, resize to 300px width / 120px height, execute complete user flow. Check console for errors or warnings.
convergence.definition_of_done: The refactored panel is fully functional with compact IDE design, all i18n keys correct, all contracts preserved, no regressions.

changes: Add SETTINGS.BACK or SETTINGS.BACK_BUTTON key for settings page back navigation
Review PANEL.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER for compact empty state text
Add any new ARIA label keys needed for compact layout
Remove or mark deprecated keys from old modal pattern if any
Update t() key references if any keys were renamed
Fix any integration issues found during testing
Ensure all dynamic content renders with correct i18n strings

actions: Grep all t('...') calls in panel/index.js to collect required keys
Compare with i18n/zh.js exports to find missing keys
Add new keys for settings back button, any new UI labels
Mark deprecated keys (from modal pattern) with comment
Open panel in Cocos Creator editor
Execute full user flow: search, add, delete, settings, shortcuts
Fix any visual or functional issues found
Verify 17 $ bindings: log this.$btn through this.$settingsContent in ready()
Verify IPC: trigger each of the 13 message handlers
Verify keyboard shortcuts: CmdOrCtrl+F, Escape, Enter, A, D, Enter/Space on result, Escape in settings
Verify DataManager: spot-check key API calls (isFavorite, getAutoMountEnabled, etc.)

reference.pattern: i18n/zh.js key organization: MAIN_MENU, PANEL, ADVANCED_PANEL, SEARCH, SETTINGS, ARIA, COMMON sections
reference.examples: Keys follow dotted path convention: t('SETTINGS.FAVORITES.TITLE'), t('PANEL.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER')

rationale.chosen_approach: Final integration task after all CSS/HTML/JS changes to catch cross-cutting issues and ensure i18n completeness.
alternatives_considered: Update i18n in each previous task (splits responsibility, harder to track completeness)
Skip i18n review (risky - missing keys cause visible errors)
rationale.tradeoffs: This task depends on all others completing first; cannot parallelize

manual_checks: No console errors on panel open
All visible text is properly translated (no raw key paths shown)
Settings page shows all section titles in Chinese
Empty state shows localized placeholder text
Panel resizes gracefully from 300px to 450px width
success_metrics: Zero missing i18n key warnings in console
Complete user flow executes without errors

commit.message_template: refactor(panel): update i18n keys and verify full integration
